source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Compact English product UI with Japanese typography guidance for tea ceremony logs, harvest lots, steep timers, tasting notes, inventory screens, command search, and calm status messaging.
layout: Operational tea dashboards, ritual planning flows, 8px radii, deep tea-green navigation, new-leaf lime actions, mist-paper surfaces, vein-line borders, and restrained leaf-shadow depth.

prompts.label: Transparent Tea Leaf motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Tea Leaf transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a fresh tea leaf sprig for a Morphous design-system motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: one elegant Camellia sinensis new-growth tea sprig with a central pale lime bud, two glossy serrated young leaves, deep green mature leaf underside accents, visible fine veins, slender tea stem, tiny dew-like surface sheen but fully opaque leaf edges. The motif should feel like mountain tea field ritual: deep green, new leaf lime, cool mist.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, refined realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges, natural clean studio light.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; diagonal-but-balanced sprig shape; do not crop the subject; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: calm ritual system, quiet, precise, fresh; no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: deep tea green, new leaf lime, pale mist green highlights, muted tea stem olive, cool leaf shadow only; do not use magenta anywhere in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no cup, no teapot, no field, no second plant, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Input images: use the visible transparent Tea Leaf motif as the source reference for color, texture, silhouette, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-compatible design-system board titled "Morphous Tea Leaf".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable UI labels, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: calm ritual system for tea ceremony planning, mountain tea field operations, tasting notes, steep timers, harvest lots, and inventory review; quiet, precise, restorative, operational.
Color palette: derive only from the visible tea leaf motif: deep tea green, glossy leaf shadow, new leaf lime, pale mist green, vein yellow-green, muted tea stem olive, cool mountain mist off-white, soft field haze neutrals, and steeped leaf ink. Do not introduce unrelated blue, purple, coral, or generic SaaS colors.
Layout: premium product design board with a left palette/token rail, top typography strip, central component and form examples, right navigation/dashboard/table/search modules, and a bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and token samples. Include a small tea leaf motif preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance for ritual logs and inventory screens. Include readable examples such as "茶葉", "抽出記録", "在庫", "今日の一煎", "山霧".
Components: primary button, secondary button, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, steep timer card, tasting notes card, inventory table, harvest lot chart, loading state, empty state, error state, success state.
Texture/materials: subtle serrated leaf-edge dividers, fine vein-line texture, misty field paper surfaces, dew highlight chips, 8px-radius cards and controls, restrained shadows.
Implementation notes visible as tokens: radius 8px, spacing scale 4/8/12/16/24/32, soft mist shadow, leaf vein border, calm focus ring.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels fit their containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn product design board; no marketing hero; no abstract gradients; no watermark; no random logos; no unrelated saturated colors; no purple or blue gradients.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Input images: use the visible transparent Tea Leaf motif and the visible Morphous Tea Leaf light design-system board as source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation of the same shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system, titled "Morphous Tea Leaf". It must feel like the same calm ritual system in dark mode, not a new motif.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable UI labels, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: night-mode calm ritual system for tea ceremony planning, mountain tea field operations, tasting notes, steep timers, harvest lots, and inventory review; quiet, precise, restorative, operational.
Color palette: derive only from the visible tea leaf motif: deep steeped green and leaf-shadow backgrounds, glossy dark tea panels, new leaf lime primary controls, pale mist green text, vein yellow-green chart accents, muted tea stem olive borders, cool mountain mist highlights. No unrelated blue, purple, coral, neon, or generic SaaS colors.
Layout: keep the same section coverage and product-board logic as the light board: left palette/token rail, top typography strip, central component and form examples, right navigation/dashboard/table/search modules, and bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and token samples. Include a small tea leaf motif preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance. Include readable examples such as "茶葉", "抽出記録", "在庫", "今日の一煎", "山霧".
Components: primary button, secondary button, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, steep timer card, tasting notes card, inventory table, harvest lot chart, loading state, empty state, error state, success state.
Texture/materials: subtle dark serrated leaf-edge dividers, fine vein-line texture, mist-on-tea-shadow surfaces, dew highlight chips, 8px-radius cards and controls, restrained dark shadows.
Implementation notes visible as tokens: radius 8px, spacing scale 4/8/12/16/24/32, steeped mist shadow, leaf vein border, lime focus ring.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels fit their containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn product design board; no marketing hero; no abstract gradients; no watermark; no random logos; no unrelated saturated colors; no pure black flat background; no purple or blue gradients.
